title: eMKay® Retro Noughts and Crosses – Classic Wooden Tic Tac Toe Game (10x10x4cm) – Vintage Style Family Toy, Travel Game & Gift for Kids and Adults
features: ❌⭕ Classic Game of Noughts & Crosses – Enjoy this traditional game of quick thinking and strategy in a compact and timeless format.
🪵 Sturdy Wooden Box & Pieces – Features a high-quality wooden game board and durable noughts and crosses pieces stored in a solid box with a sliding lid.
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Fun for All Ages – Great for kids and adults alike, this simple two-player game is perfect for developing logic and friendly competition.
🧳 Perfect for Travel & Small Spaces – At just 10 x 10 x 4 cm, this mini set is ideal for travel, party bags, classroom rewards, or on-the-go entertainment.
🎩 Charming Vintage Look – Retro-inspired design makes it a decorative collectible for lovers of classic toys and traditional games.
📦 Includes: Full Noughts & Crosses Set – Compact game box with wooden board and 9 play pieces. Great for game nights, gifting, or keeping kids busy on the move.
📦 PACKAGING MAY VARY - Due to different production batches, packaging design may differ.
